strategy: This is a 47,780-health Challenge boss, so run it as a team: a hitter, supports who blade and Feint, and a healer. He resists Ice and Death 68%, so hit with Storm or Life (only 28% resist).
Every round he adds a Tower Shield in a 3-round cycle: -25% on rounds 1, 4, 7; -50% on rounds 2, 5, 8; -90% on rounds 3, 6, 9. The shields stack until broken.
The -90% shield on rounds 3, 6, and 9 is the wall. Do not let it sit on him for your nuke.
Stack blades and Feints through the cycle, then Shatter or pop his stacked Tower Shields the same round your hitter goes.
Time the kill so a fresh -25% round has just landed rather than a -90%, and finish with one big Storm or Life AoE.
cheatNotes: A -25% Tower Shield on rounds 1, 4, and 7. Small, but it stacks with the others.
A -50% Tower Shield on rounds 2, 5, and 8.
A -90% Tower Shield on rounds 3, 6, and 9, the wall. Shatter or pop his shields before your hitter commits.
